text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This year's summer camp has come.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I thought I would be prepared since it happened
last year too...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: But, gaaah! Dang it! I'm so gosh darn hyped!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Just thinking about going out on an overnight trip
has my heart pounding up a storm!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Calm down?! Like I could! I'm an Umamusume
right smack dab in the springtime of her youth!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Not only is my heart going a mile a minute, even breathing is a little—Cough! Wheeze!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Crap, this is bad! C'mon, Golshi! Breathe!
Breathe, darn you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look over at Gold Ship when our bus pulls into
the campground.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's worn herself out and fallen asleep, just like
last year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm a bit uneasy, but I'll do my best this year too!
